* stay focused, and see things through to the end, than leave them half baked
mor29bmaj5asg.during:
tools : SCRAPING : Apify, (look for others); perplexity, (lobster??....TRANSCRIPTS process - NotebookLM
Thnk of 3 Content SOPs that could be useful :
- recent news and updates (time-wise; topic-wise; publisher-wise)
- topic/publisher based compile
- UoT type project deep-research
- creating checkpoints during workflow seetup, automation process (for the AI) to have the best context, so keep summarizing progress with the AI
- they developed the whole SOP and turned into a SKILL. Skill.md created...and keep fine-tuning, updating ongoing 
- your experience in future is now all the projects, the processes, the workflows, Markdown files etc. that you have created

stay focused, and see things through to the end, than leave them half baked
